zh.lifeSummary: 當Burckard von Zollern II; Count of Zollern-Hohenberg於1096年出生時，他的父親Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern36歲，母親Udalhild von Urach24歲。他和Helmburgis Von Schala-Burghausen Count of Hhenberg至少有1個兒子。他去世於1150年9月24日在德國巴登可萊斯 奧分波格度爾巴賀霍恩格享年54歲。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Zollern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Halloran
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hAllmhuráin ‘descendant of Allmhurán’, a personal name from a diminutive of allmhurach ‘foreigner’ (from all ‘beyond’ + muir ‘sea’).

nameMeanings.name: Burckard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Burckhardt  . This form of the surname is also found in Alsace and Lorraine.

variants.name: Burckhardt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Dieter, Ewald, Inge, Jochem, Klaus.
German: variant of   Burkhart  . This form of the surname is also found in Alsace and Lorraine.

en.lifeSummary: When Burckard von Zollern II; Count of Zollern-Hohenberg was born in 1096, his father, Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern, was 36 and his mother, Udalhild von Urach, was 24. He had at least 1 son with Helmburgis Von Schala-Burghausen Count of Hhenberg. He died on 24 September 1150, in Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Germany, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Burckard von Zollern II; Count of Zollern-Hohenberg est né en 1096, son père, Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Udalhild von Urach, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Helmburgis Von Schala-Burghausen Count of Hhenberg. Il est décédé le 24 septembre 1150, à Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Allemagne, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.Hohenberg, Schwarzwaldkreis, Wurttemberg: Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Burckard von Zollern II; Count of Zollern-Hohenberg 1096 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern 36 und seine Mutter Udalhild von Urach 24. Er hatte mit Helmburgis Von Schala-Burghausen Count of Hhenberg mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 24. September 1150 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Burckard von Zollern II; Count of Zollern-Hohenberg è nato il nel 1096, il suo padre, Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Udalhild von Urach, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Helmburgis Von Schala-Burghausen Count of Hhenberg. Morì il 24 settembre 1150, nel Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Germania, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Burckard von Zollern II; Count of Zollern-Hohenbergが1096年に生まれた時，父Friedrich l. Graf von Zollernは36歳，母Udalhild von Urachは24歳であった。彼はHelmburgis Von Schala-Burghausen Count of Hhenbergとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1150年9月24日にドイツバデンクレイス オフエンブルグダルバチホーヘンバーグで54歳で死去した。

ko.Hohenberg, Schwarzwaldkreis, Wurttemberg: 독일 바든 크레이스 펜버그 뒤르바치 호헨버그
ko.lifeSummary: Burckard von Zollern II; Count of Zollern-Hohenberg(이)가 1096년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Udalhild von Urach(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Helmburgis Von Schala-Burghausen Count of Hhenberg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1150년 9월 24일 독일 바든 크레이스 펜버그 뒤르바치 호헨버그에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Burckard von Zollern II; Count of Zollern-Hohenberg nasceu em 1096, seu pai, Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Udalhild von Urach, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Helmburgis Von Schala-Burghausen Count of Hhenberg. Ele faleceu em 24 de setembro de 1150, em Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Alemanha, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Burckard von Zollern II; Count of Zollern-Hohenberg родился в 1096 г., его отцу по имени Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Udalhild von Urach, 24. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Helmburgis Von Schala-Burghausen Count of Hhenberg. Он умер 24 сентября 1150 г. в местности хохенбирг, дурбач, крис оффенбург, баден, Германия в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Burckard von Zollern II; Count of Zollern-Hohenberg nació en 1096, su papá, Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Udalhild von Urach, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Helmburgis Von Schala-Burghausen Count of Hhenberg. Murió el 24 de septiembre de 1150, en Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Alemania, a la edad de 54 años.
